title: Darwin, Northern Territory — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Darwin, Northern Territory: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Darwin is a city in Northern Territory with a population of 148,564. Australia’s tropical northern capital with a multicultural vibe, outdoor markets, and Litchfield National Park.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
